	Réduis au maximum les expressions suivantes.
	\begin{enumerate}[cols=2]
		\item \(-a + (-b – c )\)
		\item \(3\cdot (2x + 2 )\)
		\item \( – (3x - 2y) +(x - y)\)
		\item \((x + 4y)\cdot 2x\)
		\item \(-2 + (a + 4) - (-3 + a)\)
		\item \(2a \cdot (2a-5b)+12ab\)
		\item \(x²-(5x² -2x + 3)\)
		\item \((5a +5a^2)+(4 + 3a\cdot 2)\cdot 3a\)
		\item \(3+(x-5)+(x^2-5x) \)
		\item \(5a+(5-a)\cdot 4\)
		\item \(3 - 5y \cdot 2xy + 2\cdot 3x^2\cdot 5y - 10\)
		\item \(9 + 3(2a + 7) - (3a + 9)\)
	\end{enumerate}
